---
name: Subsystem Issue
about: Report issues with specific engineering models (Power, Thermal, ADCS, Comm, Propulsion, Orbit)
title: '[SUBSYSTEM] '
labels: subsystem
assignees: ''
---

## Subsystem Name
Select the affected subsystem:
- [ ] Power Subsystem
- [ ] Thermal Subsystem
- [ ] Communications Subsystem
- [ ] Propulsion Subsystem
- [ ] ADCS Subsystem
- [ ] Orbit Subsystem
- [ ] Structural / Payload Subsystems

## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of the modeling bug or invalid engineering calculation.

## Mathematical or Physics Formula
If relevant, specify the formula that is modeled incorrectly (e.g. wrong Stefan-Boltzmann constant, free-space path loss scaling, or Kepler equations).

## Expected vs Actual Outputs
Provide numerical values showing the mismatch.
- Expected: X
- Actual: Y
